handles: creating → populate ULID prefix `org_`
creating → refuse when slug fails valid_role_name-style regex config('organization.validation.require_slug_pattern')
creating → refuse when slug is in config('organization.validation.reserved_slugs') UNLESS the system-context bypass flag is set (SeedDefaultOrganizationForTenantJob sets it)
creating → refuse when the (tenant_id, slug) pair already exists in a non-deleted row (defense-in-depth on top of the partial-unique index)
creating → refuse when parent_id.tenant_id != current tenant_id — fire ORGANIZATION_PARENT_CROSS_TENANT + audit critical
creating → refuse when parent_id is set + tenant lacks organization_hierarchy entitlement — fire ORGANIZATION_NESTING_NOT_ENTITLED
creating → refuse when parent_id is set + parent's tree_depth + 1 exceeds config('organization.hierarchy.max_depth') — fire ORGANIZATION_PARENT_DEPTH_EXCEEDED
creating → build tree_path = TreePathBuilder::build(parent.tree_path_ancestors, self.id) + set tree_depth accordingly
creating → consume 1 unit of organization_slot entitlement (throws QuotaExceeded when cap reached)
creating (is_default=true) → set is_default=false on every other row for this tenant in the same transaction (auto-demote)

creating → refuse when branding-column writes (logo_url, primary_color, secondary_color, description) are present + tenant lacks organization_branding entitlement — fire ORGANIZATION_BRANDING_NOT_ENTITLED
created → fire OrganizationCreated + TenantDefaultOrganizationSeeded when the was_seeded flag is set
saving parent_id → refuse when new parent_id.tenant_id != current tenant_id (ORGANIZATION_PARENT_CROSS_TENANT)
saving parent_id → refuse when tenant lacks organization_reparent entitlement — fire ORGANIZATION_REPARENT_NOT_ENTITLED (distinct from the create-time organization_hierarchy check)
saving parent_id → invoke CycleDetectorStrategy: walk the proposed parent's ancestors looking for self — refuse with ORGANIZATION_PARENT_CYCLE + cycle_path payload when found
saving parent_id → refuse when new depth exceeds max_depth (ORGANIZATION_PARENT_DEPTH_EXCEEDED)
saving parent_id → capture old_tree_path + old_depth into the pending event payload; recompute tree_path + tree_depth for self within the transaction
saving is_default=true → auto-demote every OTHER row for this tenant in the same transaction (single-default invariant)
saving is_default=false → refuse when this is the only is_default=true row for the tenant (ORGANIZATION_IS_DEFAULT — must promote another first)
saving status → refuse invalid transitions: cannot resume from archived; cannot pause is_default=true (ORGANIZATION_IS_DEFAULT); cannot pause an already-archived row
saving status → refuse status=archived on is_default=true row (ORGANIZATION_IS_DEFAULT)
saved (parent_id changed) → fire OrganizationParentChanged with descendant_count computed from tree_path prefix scan
saved (is_default flipped to true) → fire OrganizationDefaultChanged(source='action')
saved (status changed) → fire OrganizationStatusChanged
saved (branding fields changed) → fire OrganizationBrandingUpdated
saved (other mutable fields changed) → fire OrganizationUpdated
deleting → refuse when is_default=true (ORGANIZATION_IS_DEFAULT)
deleting → refuse when descendants exist (children.parent_id = self.id AND deleted_at IS NULL) — fire ORGANIZATION_HAS_DESCENDANTS + descendant_count
deleting → refuse when branches reference this org (branches.organization_id = self.id AND deleted_at IS NULL) — fire ORGANIZATION_IN_USE + branch_count
deleting → fire OrganizationArchived (soft-delete = archive semantics)
restoring → refuse when the tenant is at organization_slot cap (would re-consume 1 unit that isn't available)
restoring → refuse when slug conflicts with a live row
restored → fire OrganizationRestored
any-mutation → invalidate the `organization-tree` cache tag on the tenant
